'''âw-h-n''' ('''kawahan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:podcatch|podcatch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:podcatch|podcatch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-h-n
|-
! Lemma
| kawahan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwahan|thiwahan]] || [[word:jiwahan|jiwahan]] || [[word:shiwahan|shiwahan]] || [[word:kiwahan|kiwahan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwahan|thuthuwahan]] || [[word:jujuwahan|jujuwahan]] || [[word:shushuwahan|shushuwahan]] || [[word:kukuwahan|kukuwahan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwahan|thuwahan]] || [[word:juwahan|juwahan]] || [[word:shuwahan|shuwahan]] || [[word:kuwahan|kuwahan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwahan|thuwahan]] || [[word:juwahan|juwahan]] || [[word:shuwahan|shuwahan]] || [[word:kuwahan|kuwahan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewahan|thewahan]] || [[word:jewahan|jewahan]] || [[word:shewahan|shewahan]] || [[word:kewahan|kewahan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowahan|thothowahan]] || [[word:jojowahan|jojowahan]] || [[word:shoshowahan|shoshowahan]] || [[word:kokowahan|kokowahan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowahan|thowahan]] || [[word:jowahan|jowahan]] || [[word:showahan|showahan]] || [[word:kowahan|kowahan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowahan|thowahan]] || [[word:jowahan|jowahan]] || [[word:showahan|showahan]] || [[word:kowahan|kowahan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwahan|thĂŠwahan]] || [[word:jĂŠwahan|jĂŠwahan]] || [[word:shĂŠwahan|shĂŠwahan]] || [[word:kĂŠwahan|kĂŠwahan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawahan|thathawahan]] || [[word:jajawahan|jajawahan]] || [[word:shashawahan|shashawahan]] || [[word:kakawahan|kakawahan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawahan|thawahan]] || [[word:jawahan|jawahan]] || [[word:shawahan|shawahan]] || [[word:kawahan|kawahan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawahan|thawahan]] || [[word:jawahan|jawahan]] || [[word:shawahan|shawahan]] || [[word:kawahan|kawahan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawahan|shawahan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawahan|goshawahan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawahan|gokishawahan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawahanĂŒ|shawahanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawahanknĂŒ|goshawahanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahanĂŒ|gokishawahanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawahanshĂ«|shawahanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawahankshĂ«|goshawahankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawahanshĂ«|gokishawahanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahanro|shawahanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahankro|goshawahankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahanro|gokishawahanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahanmu|shawahanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahankmu|goshawahankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahanmu|gokishawahanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawahansher|shawahansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawahanksher|goshawahanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawahansher|gokishawahansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawahang|shawahang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawahankng|goshawahankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawahang|gokishawahang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawahanya|shawahanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawahankya|goshawahankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawahanya|gokishawahanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawahanyam|shawahanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawahankyam|goshawahankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawahanyam|gokishawahanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahanĂŒshĂ«|shawahanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahanknĂŒshĂ«|goshawahanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahanĂŒshĂ«|gokishawahanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahanĂŒro|shawahanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahanknĂŒro|goshawahanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahanĂŒro|gokishawahanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahanĂŒmu|shawahanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahanknĂŒmu|goshawahanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahanĂŒmu|gokishawahanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahanshĂ«nĂŒ|shawahanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawahankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawahanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahanshĂ«ro|shawahanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahankshĂ«ro|goshawahankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahanshĂ«ro|gokishawahanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahanshĂ«mu|shawahanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahankshĂ«mu|goshawahankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahanshĂ«mu|gokishawahanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahanronĂŒ|shawahanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahankronĂŒ|goshawahankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahanronĂŒ|gokishawahanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahanroshĂ«|shawahanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahankroshĂ«|goshawahankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahanroshĂ«|gokishawahanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahanromu|shawahanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahankromu|goshawahankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahanromu|gokishawahanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahanmunĂŒ|shawahanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahankmunĂŒ|goshawahankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahanmunĂŒ|gokishawahanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahanmushĂ«|shawahanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahankmushĂ«|goshawahankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahanmushĂ«|gokishawahanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahanmuro|shawahanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahankmuro|goshawahankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahanmuro|gokishawahanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
